label: Ledge_clipping_label
reason: Mario hugs the edge of the stair ledge and wall, then abruptly transitions from the stairwell into the out-of-bounds black void with no BLJ posture or special object interaction. The sudden displacement through the wall/ledge seam and continued movement below the floor match the ledge clip behavior shown in the examples, not an SBLJ or other hyperspeed glitch.
